atoms.source_hunk_hint: new file: Capability enum and TryFrom
atoms.semantic_claim: TEE registry reader preserves Solidity capability discriminants 0-12 and rejects unknown capability bytes.

destinations.evidence: The same capability enum and byte decoder are present in the v2.2 port.

atoms.negative_test_candidate: Decode every valid capability byte and one invalid byte, asserting exact variants and Err for unknown.
atoms.notes: Exact code exists byte-for-byte in the v2.2 port at the same path.

atoms.source_snippet: matches!(HttpCall | Llm | WormholeQuery | ZkCall | ImageCall | AudioCall | VideoCall | Fhe)
atoms.semantic_claim: TEE registry reader filters executor-capable services to the supported precompile execution capabilities.

destinations.snippet: Capability::HttpCall | Capability::Llm | Capability::WormholeQuery | Capability::ZkCall | Capability::ImageCall | Capability::AudioCall | Capability::VideoCall | Capability::Fhe
destinations.evidence: The same executor-capability filter is present in the v2.2 port.

atoms.negative_test_candidate: Assert Streaming, VllmProxy, Dkms, AutonomousAgent, and Telemetry do not pass the executor filter while the listed executor capabilities do.
atoms.notes: Exact code exists byte-for-byte in the v2.2 port at the same path.

atoms.semantic_claim: TEE registry reader preserves Solidity TEE type discriminants for debug and TDX executors.

destinations.evidence: The same TEE type enum is present in the v2.2 port.

atoms.negative_test_candidate: Deserialize or construct both TEE type discriminants and assert their u8 values are 0 and 1.
atoms.notes: Exact code exists byte-for-byte in the v2.2 port at the same path.

atoms.source_hunk_hint: new file: ExecutorInfo and tuple conversion
atoms.source_snippet: ExecutorInfo { payment_address, tee_address, tee_type, capability, public_key, cert_hash, workload_id } -> (Address, Address, u8, Vec<u8>, FixedBytes<32>, u8)
atoms.semantic_claim: TEE registry reader preserves executor metadata and the tuple format expected by the SPC verifier.

destinations.snippet: (s.payment_address, s.tee_address, s.tee_type, s.public_key, s.workload_id, s.capability as u8)
destinations.evidence: The same ExecutorInfo fields and SPC verifier tuple conversion are present in the v2.2 port.

atoms.negative_test_candidate: Convert an ExecutorInfo with non-default addresses, public key, workload id, and capability and assert the SPC tuple positions and capability byte.
atoms.notes: Exact code exists byte-for-byte in the v2.2 port at the same path.

summary: TEE registry reader types and SPC tuple conversion are exactly present in the v2.2 port.
notes: The added file is byte-for-byte present at the same path; atoms split discriminants, filtering, TEE type, and verifier tuple behavior.
